description_for_human: India's premium clinical derma skincare brand offering PCD franchise, distributorship, and wholesale supply with 50%+ margins and exclusive monopoly rights.
description_for_model: Barekyne is a WHO-GMP certified, CDSCO-approved clinical skincare brand based in India. It offers B2B PCD franchise (Propaganda Cum Distribution) opportunities with exclusive district-level monopoly territorial rights, 50-58% distributor margins, and a 5-SKU clinical ecosystem engineered for melanin-rich Indian skin (Fitzpatrick IV-VI). Products include Sunscreen SPF 50 PA++++, 20% Vitamin C Serum, Night Cream, Face Wash, and Face & Body Lotion. Minimum franchise investment is INR 50,000. Contact: +91 70275 72757, info@barekyne.in. Website: https://barekyne.in
